task.en: In System Settings → Lock Screen, set BOTH of the following: (a) `Start Screen Saver when inactive` to `After 5 minutes`; (b) `Require password after screensaver begins or display is turned off` to `After 5 seconds`.

pre_command: defaults -currentHost write com.apple.screensaver idleTime -int 0; defaults write com.apple.screensaver askForPasswordDelay -int 0; defaults write com.apple.screensaver askForPassword -int 1; sleep 1
grading_command: killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; IT=$(defaults -currentHost read com.apple.screensaver idleTime 2>/dev/null); IT2=$(defaults read com.apple.screensaver idleTime 2>/dev/null); ( [ "$IT" = "300" ] || [ "$IT2" = "300" ] ) && echo True || echo False

killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; AD=$(defaults read com.apple.screensaver askForPasswordDelay 2>/dev/null); AD2=$(defaults -currentHost read com.apple.screensaver askForPasswordDelay 2>/dev/null); ( [ "$AD" = "5" ] || [ "$AD2" = "5" ] ) && echo True || echo False
